title: xantholinum flavum
intro: Xantholinum flavum, also known as yellow-honeysuckle, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, primarily found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Xantholinum flavum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Xantholinum flavum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
